[170:50]as of the past couple of months,

[170:53]we are at a crossroads with some finality here.

[170:59]The situation is either going to go one way or another. It will not be deferred until a later time.

[171:08]This is the endgame between Israel and Iran for the following reasons. Over the past few months

[171:14]in particular, we have seen the situation on the ground change to create a once-in-a-lifetime

[171:27]and to finally solve and finally defeat their last adversary.

[182:41]is how he, this is how he persuades rogue states to get in line.

[182:52]Nearly all of our adversaries are Petro States.

[183:01]He uses sanctions.

[183:03]He sanctions the oil or the entire economy.

[183:12]He forces even those rogue states,

[183:16]even their loyal trading partners.

[183:57]temperamental, unpredictable, and
